key_findings: Observed std 0.0260 and range 0.1400 are both below narrow-floor thresholds.
The current metric spread is tight enough to justify moving to same-subset multi-seed and learner-sensitivity audits.
verdict: Result is strong enough to advance the current branch.

suggested_next_hypotheses: Measure same-subset multi-seed training noise to separate optimization signal from stochasticity.
Delay downstream search expansion until learner sensitivity is clearer.
recommended_actions: Promote EXP-P1-001 as completed and archive this summary as the current global-mIoU floor.
Run same-subset multi-training-seed experiments to separate subset effect from training noise.
Run learner sensitivity ladder before expanding downstream search or surrogate work.

rubric_alignment.promote_rule: Promote only when success criteria are met and no major protocol contamination is detected.
